chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-992 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 16.12.2025 Mr. Ali Raza, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri, Assistant A.G Sindh *** This petition primarily seeks re-assessment of the petitioner in terms of the orders passed by the Supreme Court of Pakistan. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that petitioner alongwith others was inducted in police service as constable in the year 2011, but later on all appointees were discharged from service and the matter finally went up to the Supreme Court of Pakistan where orders were passed was re-assessment of the all discharged police officials of Sindh Reserve Police. He further submits that though petitioner alongwith other colleagues was called by the competent authority, but till date no order has been passed in respect of the petitioner. On being confronted learned Assistant A.G Sindh submits that order in terms of the Supreme Court’s directions will be passed within one month. Learned counsel for the petitioner is satisfied and seeks disposal of the petition in the above terms. Ordered accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
